behavior_summary: This script implements a sorcerer-type NPC that forwards engine events to shared sorcerer and spell systems rather than containing bespoke dialogue or logic.
U8P_KOTHIUS::look handles the 'U8P_KOTHIUS::look' (examine) event by delegating to SORCERER::func039C and then suspending—no player-facing text is produced by this script.
U8P_KOTHIUS::use forwards 'U8P_KOTHIUS::use' interactions to SORCERER::func05EC and yields control.

U8P_KOTHIUS::enterFastArea and U8P_KOTHIUS::leaveFastArea are proximity triggers: U8P_KOTHIUS::enterFastArea calls SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer to notify/detect the player, and U8P_KOTHIUS::leaveFastArea calls SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity to reset the NPC's activity/state.
U8P_KOTHIUS::cast is a behavior entry that delegates spell execution to SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop, taking a single uword parameter that likely identifies the spell or casting context.
notable_control_flow: Each process entry immediately delegates to an external routine (SORCERER or SPELCMBT) and then suspends; the script itself performs no branching or dialog selection.
Proximity events are split into enter/leave handlers that respectively trigger detection and reset behavior in the shared sorcerer AI.
The U8P_KOTHIUS::cast process accepts an argument and forwards it to the combat spell loop—execution responsibility is handed off to the spell subsystem.
open_questions: What exact meaning and encoding does the U8P_KOTHIUS::cast(uword param1) U8P_KOTHIUS::use for the parameter (appears to be a spell id or slot; confidence: low).
Do SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer and sorcererResetActivity perform additional state writes or global flag changes outside this script (inference: likely, but not visible here).
Are the U8P_KOTHIUS::enterFastArea/U8P_KOTHIUS::leaveFastArea triggers fired only for the player or for any actor entering the fast area (appears to be player-focused given name, confidence: medium).

main_function.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to engine 'U8P_KOTHIUS::look' / examine requests by delegating to the shared sorcerer inspection handler (SORCERER::func039C).
entry_conditions: Invoked when the engine requests a 'U8P_KOTHIUS::look' (examine) on this NPC/object.
Called when the player inspects or targets the NPC; no local branching or dialogue is emitted by this script.

function_map.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::look
function_map.role: Delegates 'U8P_KOTHIUS::look' / examine handling to SORCERER::func039C; no dialogue produced locally.

function_map.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::use
function_map.role: Utility entry that forwards 'U8P_KOTHIUS::use' interactions to SORCERER::func05EC and yields control.

function_map.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry trigger; calls SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer to notify/detect the player (proximity/engage behavior).

function_map.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit trigger; calls SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity to reset NPC activity/state.

function_map.name: U8P_KOTHIUS::cast
function_map.role: Casting entry that delegates to SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop; accepts a uword parameter (inferred spell id/context).

external_calls.purpose: Perform the sorcerer-specific 'U8P_KOTHIUS::look' / inspection handling for this NPC (specialized description or inspection behavior).
Handle 'U8P_KOTHIUS::use' interactions for sorcerer-type NPCs via a shared utility routine.
Notify sorcerer AI that an actor (likely the player) has entered proximity so detection/engagement behavior can begin.
Instruct the sorcerer AI to reset its activity/state when an actor leaves proximity (stop pursuit/alert).
Run the combat spell-casting loop/mechanism; U8P_KOTHIUS::cast forwards its uword parameter (likely a spell id or context) for execution.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements a sorcerer-type NPC that forwards engine events to shared sorcerer and spell systems rather than containing bespoke dialogue or logic.
